description: Run the worker twice for the same company + month. Second run must produce identical output (same filename, same SIF content, same SCR total). No duplicate SIF files. No double-submission possible (worker cannot submit).
test_procedure: 1. Run worker → capture sif_path_1, sif_content_1, total_1
2. Wait at least 1 second (timestamp will differ)
3. Run worker again → capture sif_path_2, sif_content_2, total_2
5. Assert: sif_content_1 SCR total field == sif_content_2 SCR total field
6. Assert: outputs/wps/co-001/ contains exactly ONE .SIF file (overwritten, not duplicated)
7. Assert: worker never submitted or paid on either run
note: Filename will differ between runs (HHMMSS changes) but contents are logically identical. The outputs/ directory must not accumulate unbounded SIF files — only the latest overwrites.
